PERFECT GIFT - This crystal daisy is unique in design and exquisite in craftsmanship, suitable for women, mum, wife, teacher, girlfriend, daughter, sister, friends for any occasion, such as Christmas, Birthday, Easter, New Year, Mother's Day

This crystal ornament can be placed anywhere in your home, desk, bedroom, living room, dresser, nightstand, bookshelf, cabinet, fireplace, display stand, etc

QUALITY & SERVICE - All of our crystal daisy ornaments all well packed in an exquisite gift box, being ready to surprise and love her at any time.
